pi_items.source: Avare source code (apps4av/avare): strings.xml defines NightModeLabel as 'Night Mode (requires restart)' and preferences.xml defines a CheckBoxPreference for this setting in the Display preferences category

Avare source code (apps4av/avare): preferences.xml defines NightMode as a CheckBoxPreference with defaultValue='false'. The task description states 'Enable the Night Mode checkbox (it should currently be unchecked)' indicating the expected final state is enabled/true. The metadata value 'enabled' represents the checked/true state in human-readable form.

privileged_info_summary: The Avare aviation GPS application (com.ds.avare) has a Night Mode display preference setting located in Preferences > Display. This setting is a checkbox preference that requires app restart to take effect. The metadata correctly identifies this setting as 'Night Mode' and the expected value as 'enabled' (corresponding to a checked/true state). The application is real open-source software from the apps4av GitHub repository, not synthetic data.
